svg.title: Freyja Mission Dashboard
svg.desc: A representation of Freyja's mission dashboard showing the agent swarm graph with publish/read message-bus edges, a kanban board lane with cards moving across todo, running, blocked, and done, a findings feed, file changes, artifacts, and the per-session coordination strategy badge.

g.text: refactor coordination engine + ship kanban mode
objective · session-aware · 5 agents alive · 12 findings · 7 cards
⌘-CLICK A SESSION TO OPEN A SPLIT PANE
CLICK A FINDING TO JUMP TO ITS TOOL CALL
